idea-plugin.name: Copy with inline issues
idea-plugin.description:
Copy code with errors and warnings as inline comments. Perfect for sharing with AI assistants (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini), code reviews, and bug reports.

Key Features

  • Smart Copy - Copy selected code or entire files with inline error/warning comments
  • Multi-Language - Supports Java, Kotlin, JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, PHP, C/C++, C#, Go, Ruby, Rust, SQL, HTML, CSS, YAML, and more
  • AI-Ready - Optimized for sharing with AI coding assistants for quick fixes
  • Comprehensive Detection - Captures syntax errors, semantic issues, and inspection warnings
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Version 1.0.8

  • Deprecated API migration - Replaced deprecated ReadAction.compute(ThrowableComputable) with runReadAction for IntelliJ Platform 261+ compatibility
  • Change notes not displayed - Fixed build configuration that caused "What's New" section to always be empty in IDE plugin settings
  • Cleaned up plugin description - Removed emoji icons from plugin description, changelog, and README for a cleaner presentation

action.description: Copy selected code with associated errors and warnings as comments
Copy entire file content with associated errors and warnings as comments
